creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
Update finance/opentaxsolver to 9.00

Added file(s):
- files/patch-src-GUI-Makefile.linux
- files/pkg-plist.in

Removed file(s):
- pkg-plist

From upstream readme...
 Jan 14, 2012 v9.00 - Initial Release for Tax Year 2011.
    Contains:
        - US-1040, w/Scheds A, B, C, D, and form 8949. 
        - State Income Taxes for Virginia, Ohio, California,
          New York, Massachusetts, New Jersey, North Carolina, 
          and Pennsylvania.
        All updated for 2011 tax-year.
  History:
    * v9.00 (1/3/12) - Initial Release for Tax Year 2011.
